task_completion.description: Log into the Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon or 'admin' visible, no login prompt).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the specified artifact in the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifacts tree or Packages view shows 'example-repo-local' expanded, with the path 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' selected.
In the Properties tab for the selected artifact, a property named 'build.name' is visible with the value 'commons-lang3-release'.
In the Properties tab for the selected artifact, a property named 'build.number' is visible with the value '42'.
In the Properties tab for the selected artifact, a property named 'qa.status' is visible with the value 'approved'.
In the Properties tab for the selected artifact, a property named 'deploy.env' is visible with the value 'production'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory Web UI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to set the properties.

integrity.description: The properties were applied to the correct artifact.
integrity.visual_evidence: The properties are shown in the context of the 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' file, not a different file or a text editor.

integrity.description: The properties were actually saved to the artifact.
integrity.visual_evidence: The properties appear in the saved list of properties for the artifact, rather than just being typed into input fields without being added/saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with an Artifactory instance at http://localhost:8082. The target artifact is located at 'example-repo-local/org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. The expected properties to be added are: 'build.name'='commons-lang3-release', 'build.number'='42', 'qa.status'='approved', and 'deploy.env'='production'.
